summary: Implemented terrain heightfield render system (US-074). Created 4 GLSL shaders (terrain edge vertex/fragment + terrain vertex dot vertex/fragment) with bass-driven macro Y-displacement via FBM noise, treble-driven vertex jitter and point size shimmer, depth fog, and palette-based coloring. Created terrainHeightfield.ts system following the wireframePolyhedra pattern: generates terrain grid via US-073 generator, creates LineSegments (edges) + Points (vertices) meshes with ShaderMaterial, positions them for perspective depth (-2Y, -3Z, tilted 30°). Registered terrain mode in main.ts with quality-tier-driven config (low: 20×30, medium: 40×60, high: 60×90). All 45 tests pass, full suite (1773 tests) passes, build succeeds.
